word: G1808 - ἐξαίρω - exaírō - ex-ah'-ee-ro - Put away

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐξαίρω

- Transliteration: Exairo

- Phonetic: ex-ah'-ee-ro

- Definition:

1. to lift up or take away out of a place

2. to remove

- Origin: from G1537 and G142

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1537 and G142; to remove: - put (take) away.
